AutomatedContact.title: Automated Contact
AutomatedContact.description: A contact that the AI agent will automatically respond to.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the contact (e.g., 5511999999999).

addedAt.description: When the contact was added to the automation list.

createdBy.description: The UID of the user who added this contact.

isActive.description: Whether the agent is currently responding to messages.

systemPrompt.description: The instructions for the AI agent.

updatedAt.description: When the settings were last updated.

/automated_contacts/{contactId}.description: List of phone numbers to automate.

/agent_settings/{userId}.description: User-specific settings for the AI agent.
